summary: Trustless V4 Temporal Cancel Guards - Iteration 128: All 7 backend tests pass. Verified: (1) POST /api/appointments/{id}/cancel returns 400 when appointment has started, (2) POST /api/invitations/{token}/cancel returns 400 for past-deadline participant cancel, (3) Frontend OrganizerDashboard correctly shows/hides cancel buttons based on temporal state, (4) Frontend SecondaryActions correctly shows/hides cancel buttons, (5) toast.error (red) is used for failed cancel attempts.

temporal_cancel_guards_tests.test_2_organizer_cancel_started_appointm: PASS - Returns 'Ce rendez-vous a déjà commencé' or 'déjà annulé'
temporal_cancel_guards_tests.test_3_participant_cancel_past_deadline_: PASS - Returns 'Le délai d'annulation est dépassé'
temporal_cancel_guards_tests.test_5_organizer_cancel_future_appointme: PASS - Future appointments can be cancelled

invitation_cancel_endpoint_tests.test_2_cancel_invited_status_returns_400: PASS - Returns 'Seule une invitation acceptée peut être annulée'

frontend_ui_tests.organizer_dashboard_action_card: PASS - Cancel button hidden when isActionStarted (line 216)
frontend_ui_tests.organizer_dashboard_timeline_card: PASS - quit-btn visible when canQuit, quit-btn-disabled visible when canQuitDisabled, hidden when isStarted
frontend_ui_tests.secondary_actions_organizer_cancel: PASS - Cancel button hidden when isStarted (line 101)
frontend_ui_tests.secondary_actions_participant_cancel: PASS - Disabled+tooltip when past deadline, hidden when started (lines 127-138)
frontend_ui_tests.toast_error_usage: PASS - toast.error used for cancel failures (OrganizerDashboard.js:637,658, SecondaryActions.js:49)

backend_organizer_cancel_guard.description: Block cancellation after appointment has started: if start_dt and now >= start_dt, returns HTTP 400 with 'Ce rendez-vous a déjà commencé. L'annulation n'est plus possible.'

backend_participant_cancel_deadline_guar.description: Block participant cancel after deadline: if now >= cancellation_deadline_dt, returns HTTP 400 with 'Le délai d'annulation est dépassé'

frontend_action_card_cancel_hidden.description: ActionCard: isActionStarted check hides cancel button when appointment has started

frontend_timeline_card_quit_buttons.description: TimelineCard: canQuit shows active button, canQuitDisabled shows disabled button with tooltip, isStarted hides button completely

frontend_secondary_actions_organizer.description: Organizer cancel button hidden when isStarted

frontend_secondary_actions_participant.description: Participant cancel: canCancelParticipation shows active button, cancelParticipationDisabled shows disabled button with tooltip

toast_error_for_cancel_failures.description: toast.error (red) is used for failed cancel attempts, not toast.success

critical_code_review_comments: Backend temporal guards correctly implemented at appointments.py:1763-1769 and invitations.py:920-934
Frontend ActionCard correctly hides cancel button when isActionStarted
Frontend TimelineCard correctly shows quit-btn, quit-btn-disabled, or hides based on temporal state
Frontend SecondaryActions correctly handles organizer and participant cancel visibility
toast.error is correctly used for cancel failures (not toast.success)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data (audit-b-deadline, audit-c-started, AUDIT1-FUTURE-SAFE)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trustless V4 temporal cancel guards verified. Key changes: (1) Backend organizer cancel guard at appointments.py:1763-1769 blocks cancel after start, (2) Backend participant cancel deadline guard at invitations.py:920-934 blocks cancel after deadline, (3) Frontend ActionCard hides cancel when isActionStarted, (4) Frontend TimelineCard shows quit-btn/quit-btn-disabled/hidden based on temporal state, (5) Frontend SecondaryActions handles both organizer and participant cancel visibility. Test data: audit-b-deadline (deadline passed, not started), audit-c-started (already started), AUDIT1-FUTURE-SAFE (future, can cancel).
